tickets.title: Reduce Extremely High Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
tickets.description: The LCP is currently 12,737ms, which is significantly above the recommended 2,500ms threshold. This is likely caused by the late loading of product images and render-blocking resources.
tickets.impact: Core Web Vitals failure, which negatively affects search engine rankings and causes high user drop-off rates.
tickets.fix: Optimize the LCP element (product hero image) by using the 'priority' attribute or 'fetchpriority=high'. Preload the main product image and ensure it is served in modern formats like AVIF or WebP. Additionally, address the render-blocking CSS file 'style.css' which is causing a 300ms delay.

tickets.title: Eliminate Excessive Unused JavaScript
tickets.description: The report identifies approximately 1.6MB of unused JavaScript. Key offenders include '6507.js' (307KB wasted) and 'radar.min.js' (210KB wasted). Total Blocking Time (TBT) is high at 2,315ms.
tickets.impact: Heavy main-thread load delays Time to Interactive (TTI) and increases data costs for mobile users.
tickets.fix: Implement code-splitting to ensure only necessary code is loaded per page. Audit and remove redundant third-party scripts. Use 'defer' or 'async' for non-critical scripts, especially 'signals-sdk-5.6.7.js' and 'quantum-victoriassecret.js', which are triggering long tasks.

tickets.title: Optimize Third-Party Tag Management
tickets.description: Third-party scripts from Google Tag Manager, Quantum Metric, and Adobe Launch are significantly impacting the main thread (contributing over 475ms of main thread time). Multiple instances of GTM tags are firing long tasks.
tickets.impact: Main thread congestion prevents the page from responding to user inputs efficiently.
tickets.fix: Consolidate tags within GTM and remove unused pixels (e.g., Snapchat, Pinterest, or Taboola if not actively used for attribution). Use a 'Request Idle Callback' strategy for non-essential tracking scripts to prioritize page rendering.

tickets.title: Fix Missing Image Alt Text
tickets.description: There are 2 images missing alt attributes. While simple, this is a fundamental SEO and accessibility requirement.
tickets.impact: Decreased accessibility for screen-reader users and missed opportunities for Image Search rankings.
tickets.fix: Audit the HTML for all tags and Button-wrapped images and ensure the 'alt' attribute contains descriptive, keyword-relevant text.

tickets.title: Resolve JavaScript Geolocation and Event Errors
tickets.description: The console report shows failures in fetching store data via geolocation and several 'Unrecognized event name' errors.
tickets.impact: Degraded user experience for store-locator features and potential data corruption in analytics tracking.
tickets.fix: Debug the geolocation API call to handle permission denials gracefully. Investigate the event listener implementation to ensure all triggered event names are properly defined in the application logic.

tickets.title: Optimize SEO Title Length
tickets.description: The current title length is 88 characters, which exceeds the optimal 50-60 character range for search engine result pages (SERPs).
tickets.impact: Titles will be truncated in search results, potentially reducing click-through rates (CTR).
tickets.fix: Rewrite the title tag to be more concise (e.g., under 60 characters) while retaining primary keywords like 'Tech Woven Retro Shorts' and the brand name.
